title: Tapping for Resentment in the Marriage
subtitle: A five-minute tapping practice for the slow build of resentment in a long partnership
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice for the resentment that has built up in a long partnership. The script lets the body name what it is carrying so the next conversation has a chance of being a useful one.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.

practice.whenToUse: Use before a big talk with your partner, after a small one that went sideways, or in a quiet hour when the resentment has been building and you want to look at it directly.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice for the resentment that builds in a long partnership. The script meets the resentment as information, not as a verdict on the relationship.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop (repeat x3)
Even though resentment has built up in this partnership and I have been carrying it quietly, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I do not want to be the wife who is full of small resentments, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though the resentment is information about what I have not asked for, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
**Eyebrow:** I have been carrying a lot of small resentments.
**Side of eye:** Most of them are about small daily things.
**Under eye:** Some of them are about big things I have not named.
**Under nose:** I have been waiting for them to notice.
**Chin:** They have not noticed.
**Collarbone:** I am tired of waiting.
**Under arm:** I have not been clear about what I want.
**Top of head:** The waiting has been growing in me.
Reframe to positive
**Eyebrow:** I can look at the resentment without it being the whole story.
**Side of eye:** I can name the small things and ask for small changes.
**Under eye:** I can name the big things, too.
**Under nose:** They cannot fix what I have not said.
**Chin:** I can ask, plainly, for what I want.
**Collarbone:** I am allowed to want it.
**Under arm:** The asking is part of how the partnership works.
**Top of head:** I can let the resentment go as I name what is underneath it.
Tap the round three times. Then tap the reframe three times.
Where this practice comes from
Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.
